testcase.name: test_lsm_has_data_structure

failure.message: TypeError: argument of type 'NoneType' is not iterable

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lsm_real_sector.py:31: in test_lsm_has_data_structure assert "latest" in lsm_data, "Missing 'latest' field" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: argument of type 'NoneType' is not iterable

testcase.name: test_lsm_latest_contains_required_fields
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lsm_real_sector.py:41: in test_lsm_latest_contains_required_fields latest = lsm_data.get("latest", {}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_lsm_mom_change_semantics
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lsm_real_sector.py:58: in test_lsm_mom_change_semantics mom_change_pct = lsm_data.get("mom_change_pct") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_lsm_yoy_change_present
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_lsm_real_sector.py:74: in test_lsm_yoy_change_present yoy_change = lsm_data.get("yoy_change") ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'
